user_outcome: A protocol maintainer sees the binary, vendored normative content, and supported Codex and Claude installations report and byte-match the exact Baton v0.15 pin.
rationale: This slice owns C-01 and performs the first permitted vendor/install activity after S01 makes that activity atomic. The mapped upstream delta is indivisible and therefore sits at the release's file ceiling. Installer writes are limited to Baton's documented user-level targets, contain no credentials, and are executed only after repository parity succeeds; there is no network, browser, PII, or accessibility contract beyond deterministic CLI output.
in_scope: Run the repaired vendor transaction from the exact v0.15.1 tag target 3fb4d275ae8a151f6287e7b9279d71628b12eea0 and record source digest sha256:8f0839ea897374eb10d6db2a789939714727739621babef1117d74cbf4488d2f in VERSION.

Update the explicit mapping, schema embed, fixture, and grade manifest for spec-ambiguity-report-v1, replace only mapped files whose v0.13.1-to-v0.15.1 upstream content changed, and embed the complete deterministic 78-entry installer-input tar whose exact archive SHA-256, Git blob OID, path/mode/blob set and extraction safety are pinned in planning/normative-clarifications.md section 2.

Preserve normative JSON schema bytes exactly; only documented Sworn command-reference transformations may affect Markdown prompt/rule copies, and a second vendor --check plus sworn baton diff must report zero drift.

After repository parity passes, run exact pinned install-codex.sh and install-claude.sh in empty isolated proof homes and treat each complete generated managed tree—including Codex frontmatter, argument-resolution prelude, and path transformations—as canonical; make the shipped binary consume the complete embedded input tar with Go stdlib only and prove its native staged output byte/mode-matches those independent script outputs without a runtime shell dependency.

Build the binary and prove sworn doctor, the embedded schema manifest, complete offline installer bundle, and both supported local mirrors agree on C-01; doctor --sync-baton stages both complete managed trees plus Sworn-owned VERSION sentinels and repairs them as one rollback-protected transaction, while a rollback failure preserves snapshots, records rollback-incomplete with sorted unrestored paths, and forces later recovery-only execution before another install.
out_of_scope: Changing any Baton v0.15 normative wording or schema shape is upstream protocol design, not downstream adoption.
Interpreting or migrating active Sworn records belongs to S03 through S05 and S17; this slice updates only embedded protocol material and supported local mirrors.
Installing or upgrading the Sworn binary outside this repository is not part of the Baton mirror installation proof.
Business, hosted-service, provider, customer, and pricing material is prohibited from every vendored or proof artefact.

effort_complexity.rationale: Ratified twenty-eight-file exception: the exact mapped delta, one complete offline installer-input bundle, both canonical installer-generated mirrors, and one transactional doctor repair/recovery boundary are indivisible and fully specified by C-01.

risks.description: The version line advances while one prompt, schema, fixture, or manifest entry remains stale.
risks.mitigation: Enumerate every mapping and SchemaMap entry from code, compare mapped normative bytes to the tag, and make TestBatonV015ExactParity fail on a missing, extra, transformed-JSON, or stale item.

risks.description: A local installer copies from a different checkout or partially replaces an existing mirror.
risks.mitigation: Resolve the installer source commit before execution, run repository parity first, use the upstream installers' bounded targets, and byte-check both mirrors before claiming success.

risks.description: Codex installer-generated wrappers are mistaken for protocol drift or an incomplete transformation set hides real drift.
risks.mitigation: Generate the complete expected tree with the exact pinned installer in an empty home and compare every managed output byte; mutation-test omitted frontmatter, argument-resolution prelude, path rewrites, and unauthorized changes.

acceptance_criteria.text: WHEN TestBatonV015ExactParity enumerates the live mapping, schema embed, manifest, VERSION, prompts, rules, fixtures, and offline installer archive THE SYSTEM SHALL prove C-01's exact tag, commit, source digest, VERSION blob identity, complete mapped set, exact 78-entry archive path/mode/blob set, archive SHA-256 27d5021cb3ec258a7fd7a5feb6eed92968be0e6cb439e2951da7c6b368e0ca15, blob 39ae650dfe0282b0fa8bda14e1a01e7084077702, and byte-identical normative JSON with no unclassified schema (N-01, N-02, N-10).

WHEN the v0.15 vendor operation completes and is immediately followed by vendor --check and baton diff THE SYSTEM SHALL make both read-only checks exit 0 with zero repository drift and SHALL leave spec-ambiguity-report-v1 embedded, addressable, and classified independently from llm-check-report-v1; any deterministic baton diff mismatch SHALL exit 1 and any malformed mapping or operational error SHALL exit 2 without mutation.

WHEN the exact pinned checkout and the safely extracted embedded installer-input archive independently run install-codex.sh -y and install-claude.sh -y in empty isolated proof homes after repository parity, and the native stdlib generator consumes the same validated archive THE SYSTEM SHALL produce three byte/mode-identical complete canonical managed trees, including every command, baton document, role prompt, template, schema, Codex wrapper/frontmatter and argument-resolution/path transformation, and doctor-installed mirrors SHALL match them plus separately verified Sworn VERSION sentinels without invoking a runtime shell.

IF the embedded pin, mapped repository byte, schema classification, binary manifest, installer archive identity/content/extraction, Codex managed tree/sentinel, or Claude managed tree/sentinel differs from C-01 THEN THE SYSTEM SHALL make every applicable proof surface in section 2 fail with its exact exit; doctor --sync-baton SHALL operate on both installations as one transaction, MAY return 2 after exact repair, SHALL return 1 after verified complete restoration, and IF restoration fails SHALL exit 1 rollback-incomplete with sorted unrestored paths, preserved 0700 snapshots/sentinel and recovery-only later runs until exact restoration succeeds, while diagnostics omit payloads and credentials.
